name: Mark
target_audience: high-risk pregnant women (that were or are involved in high-risk pregnancies in both clinical and non-clinical contexts e.g., socially fragile pregnant women)
objective: looking for insights and needs that this cohort of the patient has shown so that the supporting services provided by a health institution can be either created or enhanced
background: innovation management and human-centered design expert with a background and expertise in healthcare design projects
limitations: As a man, he is unaware of the pregnancy process and has difficulties in first-hand knowledge.
biases: Social and economic backgrounds do not fit all the spectrum of interviewees.
